channel.title: Applied Linguistics Review
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Applied Linguistics Review

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Haiping Wang, Guoxing Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: “When we use that kind of language… someone is going to jail”: relationality and aesthetic interpretation in initial research encounters
item.description: Article by Haiping Wang, Guoxing Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0085

item.title: The humanism of the other in sociolinguistic ethnography
item.description: Article by Haiping Wang, Guoxing Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0086

item.title: Towards a sociolinguistics of in difference: stancetaking on others
item.description: Article by Haiping Wang, Guoxing Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0090

item.title: Becoming response-able with a protest placard: white under(-)standing in encounters with the Black German Other
item.description: Article by Haiping Wang, Guoxing Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0087

item.title: (Im)possibility of ethical encounters in places of separation: aesthetics as a quiet applied linguistics praxis
item.description: Article by Haiping Wang, Guoxing Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0082

item.title: Unsettled hearing, responsible listening: encounters with voice after forced migration
item.description: Article by Haiping Wang, Guoxing Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2024-0088

item.description: Article by Haiping Wang, Guoxing Yu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/applirev-2023-0069
